A. AmbiguousTest

Section III.Onlyoneidentificationrulecouldnotbeimple- mented entirely,whichwastheConditionalTest,identified through subordinatingconjunctions(SCONJ)atthebeginning of adependentclauseinasentence.AsspaCydoesnot natively supportsplittingsentencesintoclauses,whichvaries from language to language, identifying SCONJ in a dependent clause in the middle of a sentence results in many identification problems by the pre-trained models. This problem resulted in 8 false negatives identified in the validation activity, representing approximately 27% of the test smells not identified by the tool.
